trans-unit.target: TEXT_KINGMK101_05470_SEQ_00<tab>Krile has a wistful glint in her eyes.

TEXT_KINGMK101_05470_SEQ_01<tab>Having returned from the Mist Continent, Krile reflects upon her time in Treno and reaffirms her commitment to support Miayli and the rest of the Milalla community that abide there. As thoughts turn from the storm-scarred environs of the Ninth to the revelations that might await in Preservation's research documents, Y'shtola informs you via linkpearl that their decryption efforts have met with success. Wishing to share their findings, she bids you join her and Shale in the deuterolab located within the containment complex.
※Speak with the lift attendant in Resolution to travel to Containment Complex 10-29.

TEXT_KINGMK101_05470_SEQ_02<tab>According to Shale and Y'shtola, the decrypted data shed no light on how Calyx came to learn primal summoning techniques. However, the documents did reveal much about Preservation's experiments with the key, not to mention their attempts to control its world-bridging capabilities by means of an actuation device. The decision is made to remove the contraption, using the conveniently functional mechanism designed for that express purpose. As the key is liberated from its vessel, Krile receives a linkpearl call from a concerned Ojika Tsunjika, who relays that Tataru wishes to speak with the group, though she is loath to impose by requesting your immediate return. You nevertheless resolve to depart for Sharlayan, where Tataru is currently staying, and bid a heartfelt farewell to Shale, leaving Y'shtola to further examine the key.

TEXT_KINGMK101_05470_SEQ_03<tab>Ojika greets you in the Baldesion Annex, reiterating his concern for Tataru before offering to go and fetch her. Sensing you might be tired from your journey, he invites you to relax in the main hall while he is gone.

TEXT_KINGMK101_05470_SEQ_04<tab>Though Tataru is delighted to see you, the jubilant mood does not last long. She reveals that rumors of voidsent emerging from fissures across the star have reached her ears─rumors since verified by the Grand Company of Eorzea itself. When Krile voices her fears concerning Garlemald and its deep connection to the void, Tataru mentions a report from Alphinaud and Alisaie, who were present when the trouble there unfolded...

TEXT_KINGMK101_05470_SEQ_05<tab>It seems that not long after the twins had shared their Turali adventures with the Garlean community, terrified imperial soldiers brought word of voidsent attacks on Lapis Manalis and a munitions factory known as the Clyteum. Having brought everyone up to speed, Tataru urges you to make for Garlemald immediately, where Alphinaud and Alisaie are preparing to support Jullus and his forces. Thus does your brief sojourn in Sharlayan come to an end.
TEXT_KINGMK101_05470_TODO_00<tab>Speak with Shale in the deuterolab.
TEXT_KINGMK101_05470_TODO_01<tab>Speak with Ojika Tsunjika at the Baldesion Annex.
TEXT_KINGMK101_05470_TODO_02<tab>Wait at the designated location in the main hall.
TEXT_KINGMK101_05470_TODO_03<tab>Speak with Tataru.
TEXT_KINGMK101_05470_KRILE_000_001<tab>I trust you were able to get plenty of rest? Good. I thought we might take a moment to ponder our next steps─and perhaps reflect on our recent journey.
TEXT_KINGMK101_05470_KRILE_000_002<tab>I must admit my thoughts often drift to the Mist Continent and our stay in Treno...
TEXT_KINGMK101_05470_KRILE_000_003<tab>It was heartening to see the Milalla prosper despite the odds, and my own flesh and blood strive in that levin-wracked landscape.
TEXT_KINGMK101_05470_GRAHATIA_100_004<tab>Sphene was eager to restore diplomatic relations, and I have no doubt that Alexandria will provide much-needed support for their neighbor.
TEXT_KINGMK101_05470_KRILE_000_005<tab>I too shall do everything I can to aid my home away from home─my wonderful, welcoming family included.
TEXT_KINGMK101_05470_KRILE_000_006<tab>For the time being, though, I'd say we've accomplished all within our power.
TEXT_KINGMK101_05470_GRAHATIA_000_007<tab>I suppose that just leaves the matter of Preservation's research...
TEXT_KINGMK101_05470_GRAHATIA_000_008<tab>It is yet unclear how Calyx learned the techniques he used to summon his dark primal.
TEXT_KINGMK101_05470_GRAHATIA_000_009<tab>And there is likewise much that remains unknown about the key. Let us hope that Shale's efforts bear more fruit.
TEXT_KINGMK101_05470_YSHTOLA_000_010<tab>(-Y'shtola-)Can you hear me?
TEXT_KINGMK101_05470_YSHTOLA_000_011<tab>(-Y'shtola-)Shale and I have been reviewing the decrypted files, and have uncovered some intriguing details. Would you care to join us?
TEXT_KINGMK101_05470_KRILE_000_012<tab>We'll be with you right away.
TEXT_KINGMK101_05470_YSHTOLA_000_013<tab>(-Y'shtola-)Excellent. Shale seems rather eager to speak with you all. Come and find us in the deuterolab when you're ready.
TEXT_KINGMK101_05470_KRILE_000_014<tab>Uncanny timing indeed! Let us make for the containment complex.
TEXT_KINGMK101_05470_LIFTATTENDANT_000_015<tab>Heading for the containment complex? Right this way!
TEXT_KINGMK101_05470_SYSTEM_000_020<tab>Proceed to Containment Complex 10-29?
TEXT_KINGMK101_05470_YSHTOLA_000_025<tab>Given that all the data is stored within electrope devices, Shale's expertise has proven invaluable.

TEXT_KINGMK101_05470_YSHTOLA_000_100<tab>Given that Preservation could not unlock the secrets of the key, it should come as no surprise that we too struggle to understand its nature... In any event, do give Tataru my regards when you see her.
TEXT_KINGMK101_05470_YSHTOLA_000_105<tab>Ah, I ought to mention that we also uncovered information unrelated to the key.

TEXT_KINGMK101_05470_YSHTOLA_000_110<tab>According to Shale, certain confidential reports are now accessible via devices in the researchers' commons and the director's office. You might wish to peruse the files before you depart for Sharlayan.
TEXT_KINGMK101_05470_SHALE_000_115<tab>My colleagues will be just as saddened by your departure. Until we meet again, safe journeys!

TEXT_KINGMK101_05470_GRAHATIA_000_120<tab>Oh dear... It occurs to me that I neglected to bring gifts from Tural. Considering the extra work they've had to handle in my absence, I daresay I owe them a veritable mountain of snacks, at the very least...
TEXT_KINGMK101_05470_KRILE_000_125<tab>I thought it best to hear what Ojika has to say ere we meet with Tataru. I do hope she is well...
TEXT_KINGMK101_05470_OJIKATSUNJIKA_000_200<tab>Welcome back! And what a pleasure it is to see you too, <var 2C ((<var 29 EB02 /var>)) (( )) 02 /var>.
TEXT_KINGMK101_05470_KRILE_000_201<tab>Thank you for contacting us, Ojika. We came as soon as we could.
TEXT_KINGMK101_05470_OJIKATSUNJIKA_000_202<tab>Of course. I felt it prudent given how troubled Tataru was...

TEXT_KINGMK101_05470_KRILE_000_203<tab>Your concern is much appreciated. As it so happens, we'd reached a convenient juncture in our investigation. Shale and Y'shtola have matters well in hand, leaving us free to make this trip.
TEXT_KINGMK101_05470_OJIKATSUNJIKA_000_204<tab>That's a relief to hear. Now, let me fetch Tataru for you.
TEXT_KINGMK101_05470_OJIKATSUNJIKA_000_205<tab>Why don't you take a moment to relax in the main hall? I'm sure you're all still fatigued from your journey!
TEXT_KINGMK101_05470_OJIKATSUNJIKA_000_210<tab>I shan't be long, but you can unwind in the main hall while I'm gone.
TEXT_KINGMK101_05470_KRILE_000_215<tab>Only now is it beginning to feel like we've actually returned. Such fond memories within these four walls!
TEXT_KINGMK101_05470_GRAHATIA_000_220<tab>Given how frequently Tataru is away on business these days, 'tis a small miracle we're in the same place at the same time.
TEXT_KINGMK101_05470_OJIKATSUNJIKA_000_300<tab>Voidsent emerging across the star!? How fortunate I contacted you when I did... Please do take care of yourselves!
TEXT_KINGMK101_05470_KRILE_000_305<tab>Clearly we made the right decision to come to Sharlayan. Though I dearly wish the circumstances of our return were not so grave...
TEXT_KINGMK101_05470_GRAHATIA_000_310<tab>I don't believe we've seen Thancred and Urianger since our battle with the Endless Sphene, have we? They too must have returned here at some point.
TEXT_KINGMK101_05470_TATARU_000_400<tab>I've been told Alphinaud and Alisaie have withdrawn to Tertium to request aid on the front lines.
TEXT_KINGMK101_05470_TATARU_000_401<tab>They seemed intent on rejoining the battle once reinforcements were ready, but I shall tell them to wait until you arrive!
